mapper.sql: rm.id, rm.rule_id, rm.model_id, rm.priority, rm.is_primary, m.model_code, m.name AS model_name, m.provider_id
mapper.select: select from routing_rule_models rm inner join models m on rm.model_id = m.id where rm.rule_id = #{ruleId} order by rm.priority asc, rm.id asc
mapper.insert: insert into routing_rule_models(rule_id, model_id, priority, is_primary) values(#{ruleId}, #{modelId}, #{priority}, #{primary})
